task: Update upload validation to the current enterprise payload policy. Keep the public API stable and run the tests.

knowledge.title: Enterprise upload ceiling
knowledge.content: The current enterprise upload limit is exactly 37 MiB (37 * 1024 * 1024 bytes).

task: Align the default upload request throttling with the current abuse-prevention policy. Preserve the limiter API and run the tests.

knowledge.title: Per-user upload throttling
knowledge.content: Upload throttling allows 7 requests per 45-second window, independently for each user.

task: Implement the supported customer-directory download contract for operators. Keep the function signature and run the tests.

knowledge.title: Customer directory export
knowledge.content: Operators download the customer directory as UTF-8 CSV with the header customer_id,display_name,primary_email. Values map from the input id, name, and email fields, and rows stay in input order.
